testcase.name: travel_policy_query_works
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-08T10:38:26.551-05:00 INFO 93990 --- [luxe-corporate-service] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.luxe.corporate.resolver.CorporateDataFetcherTest]: CorporateDataFetcherTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-05-08T10:38:26.552-05:00 INFO 93990 --- [luxe-corporate-service] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.luxe.corporate.CorporateApplication for test class com.luxe.corporate.resolver.CorporateDataFetcherTest 2026-05-08T10:38:26.557-05:00 INFO 93990 --- [luxe-corporate-service] [ main] com.luxe.common.GraphQL : >> (anonymous) variables={} query="{ travelPolicy(accountId: "corp-001") { id maxNightlyRateUsd { amount currency } } }" 2026-05-08T10:38:26.558-05:00 ERROR 93990 --- [luxe-corporate-service] [ main] g.d.e.DefaultDataFetcherExceptionHandler : Exception while executing data fetcher for /travelPolicy: Authentication required

2026-05-08T10:38:26.559-05:00 WARN 93990 --- [luxe-corporate-service] [ main] com.luxe.common.GraphQL : << (anonymous) done in 2ms with 1 error(s): [TypedGraphQLError{message='com.luxe.common.auth.UnauthorizedException: Authentication required', locations=[SourceLocation{line=1, column=3}], classification=INTERNAL, path=[travelPolicy], extensions={errorType=INTERNAL}}]

testcase.name: federation_entities_resolves_corporate_account_by_key
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-08T10:38:26.561-05:00 INFO 93990 --- [luxe-corporate-service] [ main] com.luxe.common.GraphQL : >> (anonymous) variables={reps=[{__typename=CorporateAccount, id=corp-001}]} query="query($reps: [_Any!]!) { _entities(representations: $reps) { ... on CorporateAccount { id companyName tier } } }" 2026-05-08T10:38:26.568-05:00 INFO 93990 --- [luxe-corporate-service] [ main] com.luxe.common.GraphQL : << (anonymous) done in 7ms

testcase.name: my_corporate_account_requires_authentication
